U1-FM-01: contrast same number of groups with same number in each group
compare matched and mismatched group sets
name group size explicitly in teacher language
U1-FM-02: count each group after making it
line up groups side by side
adjust one mismatched group to match the others
U1-FM-03: distribute one object per group in rounds
mark group spaces before placing objects
U1-FM-04: move from objects to pictures to short stories
ask what makes the groups equal in each case
use paired object and story examples
